SEARCH

序列化表格

      -4547468301777433024L

      • 序列化字段

        • end
          int end
        • start
          int start

        • offset
          int offset
        • parent

        • span

      serialVersionUID:
      5320929211828633858L

          String color
        • style

        • width

    • 类 com.bstek.ureport.definition.CellDefinition

      class CellDefinition extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      -2667510071560936139L

      • 序列化字段

        • cellStyle
          CellStyle cellStyle
        • colSpan
          int colSpan
        • columnChildrenCells
          List<CellDefinition> columnChildrenCells
          当前单无格所在列的所有子格
        • columnNumber
          int columnNumber
        • conditionPropertyItems
          List<ConditionPropertyItem> conditionPropertyItems
        • duplicateRange
          Range duplicateRange
        • expand
          Expand expand
        • fillBlankRows
          boolean fillBlankRows
        • increaseSpanCellNames
          List<String> increaseSpanCellNames
        • leftParentCell
          CellDefinition leftParentCell
          当前单元格左父格
        • leftParentCellName
          String leftParentCellName
          当前单元格左父格名
        • linkParameters
          List<LinkParameter> linkParameters
        • linkTargetWindow
          String linkTargetWindow
        • linkUrl
          String linkUrl
        • linkUrlExpression
          Expression linkUrlExpression
        • multiple
          int multiple
          允许填充空白行时fillBlankRows=true，要求当前数据行数必须是multiple定义的行数的倍数，否则就补充空白行
        • name
          String name
        • newBlankCellsMap
          Map<String,BlankCellInfo> newBlankCellsMap
        • newCellNames
          List<String> newCellNames
        • rowChildrenCells
          List<CellDefinition> rowChildrenCells
          当前单无格所在行的所有子格
        • rowNumber
          int rowNumber
        • rowSpan
          int rowSpan
        • topParentCell
          CellDefinition topParentCell
          当前单元格上父格
        • topParentCellName
          String topParentCellName
          当前单元格上父格名
        • value
          Value value

  • 程序包 com.bstek.ureport.expression.model.expr.dataset

    • 类 com.bstek.ureport.expression.model.expr.dataset.DatasetExpression

      class DatasetExpression extends BaseExpression implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      -8794866509447790340L

      • 序列化字段

        • aggregate
          AggregateType aggregate
        • condition
          Condition condition
        • conditions
          List<Condition> conditions
          此属性给设计器使用，引擎不使用该属性
        • datasetName
          String datasetName
        • groupItems
          List<GroupItem> groupItems
          当aggregate类型为自定义分组时，采用此属性来存储自定义分组各个项目
        • mapping
          Map<String,String> mapping
        • mappingDataset
          String mappingDataset
        • mappingItems
          List<MappingItem> mappingItems
        • mappingKeyProperty
          String mappingKeyProperty
        • mappingType
          MappingType mappingType
        • mappingValueProperty
          String mappingValueProperty
        • order
          Order order
        • property
          String property
